title: Last Eva Manga Volume Features New Character
display_title: Last Eva Manga Volume Features New Character
wikitext:
[]: Last Eva Manga Volume Features New Character             Quote Post by Dima » Sat Jul 19, 2014 7:45 am Thought it deserves a new thread https://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2014-07-19/last-evangelion-manga-volume-bonus-story-features-new-character/.76835

[]:             Quote Post by obliterates » Sat Jul 19, 2014 7:53 am Aren't they jumping the gun a bit though? That looks like young Mari, and she's holding Mari's glasses Here is a bigger picture of the character: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sat Jul 19, 2014 9:08 am Mari with her hair down? Yes please. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by gwern » Sat Jul 19, 2014 9:27 am obliterates wrote: Aren't they jumping the gun a bit though? That looks like young Mari, and she's holding Mari's glasses

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sat Jul 19, 2014 9:43 am @ TM SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by artesox » Sat Jul 19, 2014 9:57 am Geez, who could it be.

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sat Jul 19, 2014 10:01 am ^ It can't be Mari, Mari wears glasses. Isn't it odd that that woman who doesn't wear glasses isn't ever in the same room with Mari?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sat Jul 19, 2014 10:04 am Evafan has pointed out something interesting: http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-3149.html Usually Sadamoto's manga has the copyright written as: "©カラー・GAINAX" (Khara and Gainax) All the ENT stuff usually has "©カラー" (just Khara) This new promotional flyer with mystery girls has both: "©カラー ©カラー・GAINAX" Evafan proposes two possibilities regarding the dual copyright of this new 28 page story: 1. It's a story based in the ENT timeline 2. It's an original Sadamoto work, but since Sadamoto is with Khara that gets the extra mention seperate form Gainax Please unleash all the ridiculous speculation. EDIT: ChaddyManPrime, she might not be wearing the glasses but she's holding them.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Sat Jul 19, 2014 10:53 am To me that just looks like Manga!Yui holding Gendo's glasses.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sat Jul 19, 2014 10:56 am Ya it looks a lot like Mari, and she looks great with hair down!

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sat Jul 19, 2014 10:57 am ^ She reminds me of when Asuka had her hair down in that bathroom scene. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Grand Duke of Yashima » Sat Jul 19, 2014 11:43 am Oh, Goodness that's Mari! No doubt about it!

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sat Jul 19, 2014 12:03 pm I think this makes Three or Four Eva Universes she's appeared in so far.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat Jul 19, 2014 12:33 pm ^ Three universes: NTE, ANIMA and now the manga, if it's actually Mari, but it looks so much like her that I can't think that it's a completely original character. Also in the image, can someone translate the partial text just at the right of Mari(?)'s head, there a 28 between brackets. (inb4 it's glasses woman seen in Fuyu's photo in Q)

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Jul 19, 2014 12:45 pm It wouldn't be Eva without finding a new way to sell it to the fans. I'd have a real big laugh if the "New Character" just turns out to be a Barista. In the new 28 pages Asuka & Shinji go to a coffee shop & the "New Character" serves them both a cup of coffee. End of story. Let the fan fiction begin!

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sat Jul 19, 2014 12:46 pm @ El The fourth is the Petite Universe if you count it, I was kinda hesitant to do so.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat Jul 19, 2014 12:56 pm ^ IIRC, she only appears very briefly in the videogame of the Petite Eva series, which is her very first appearance past the 2.0 trailer and also where her name was revealed.

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sat Jul 19, 2014 1:09 pm ^ She also shows up in some art so I count it, just hesitant to use it.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jul 19, 2014 3:01 pm I think the 28 is the mystery woman's age. Need a bigger scan to see for sure. Edit: Looks like the 28 = 28 pages after all.

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sat Jul 19, 2014 3:26 pm ^ Awww, I was already putting theories together
